name: The Weighted Verdict
specialty: Specializing in covert operations and infiltration, they have a reputation for leaving no trace of their presence.

members.name: Thalia Blackscale
members.note: Known for her cold, calculating demeanor, and a scar running down her left cheek from a past encounter.

members.name: Elysia Serpentwhisper
members.note: Her stripes are a vibrant, almost neon green, and she is rumored to possess an uncanny ability to follow trails others can't.

members.name: Gideon Stonebinder
members.note: Covered in tattoos of ancient runes, he carries a large, ornate warhammer that seems to radiate a sense of unyielding power.

visual: Dressed in dark, form-fitting leather armor and low-profile weapons, they move with a quiet, predatory grace in public. Each member wears a serpent symbol, the emblem of the Serpent Choir, hidden somewhere on their person.
reputation_note: Whispers of a group that delivers justice with a heavy hand, yet remains eerily untouchable by the city's law.
